dimensions.name: Human genetic causal evidence
dimensions.captures: Whether human genetic variation in the target gene causally affects indication phenotypes (GWAS + cis-pQTL + 2SMR signal)
dimensions.missingness_flag_meaning: candidate not present in GWAS Catalog at relevant traits

dimensions.name: Clinical / pharmacological evidence
dimensions.captures: Clinical-stage drug development activity targeting this gene for relevant indications (ChEMBL max_phase, mechanism diversity)
dimensions.missingness_flag_meaning: no clinical-stage compounds in ChEMBL targeting this gene

dimensions.name: Disease association breadth and strength
dimensions.captures: Open Targets association evidence across obesity, type 2 diabetes, NAFLD, and MASH; rewards targets relevant to multiple component conditions
dimensions.missingness_flag_meaning: no Open Targets association at threshold

dimensions.name: Literature evidence concentration
dimensions.captures: Density of metabolic-disease-context PubMed citations as a marker of established biological relevance (log-scaled to avoid hot-topic bias)

dimensions.name: Secretion status and pharmacological modulatability
dimensions.captures: Whether the protein is secreted (more amenable to multiple modalities) and the structural feasibility window (ORF size, signal peptide); target-agnostic — penalizes very large proteins regardless of identity

dimensions.name: Mechanism novelty vs current standard of care
dimensions.captures: Distance from approved mechanism classes; rewards orthogonal mechanisms relative to crowded GPCR-agonist / kinase-inhibitor classes

dimensions.name: Safety profile proxy
dimensions.captures: Proxy for safety profile based on protein class (broad-expression vs restricted) and pharmacological track record

dimensions.name: Platform deliverability (post-hoc only)
dimensions.captures: Compatibility with saRNA + sublingual microneedle delivery platform (secreted, ORF <= 15kb, no complex PTM); SCORED BUT EXCLUDED FROM COMPOSITE — used only by post-hoc platform-compatibility check
